hooks.command: input=$(cat); file_path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input", {}).get("file_path", ""))'); if [[ "$file_path" == *.py && -f "$file_path" ]] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix "$file_path"; fi

input=$(cat); file_path=$(printf '%s' "$input" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input", {}).get("file_path", ""))'); base=$(basename "$file_path"); if [[ "$base" == .env || "$base" == .env.* ]]; then echo 'Editing or writing .env files requires explicit permission. Use --force to override.' >&2; exit 2; fi
